sql_array: CREATE TABLE user_keys (user_id INT, key_name VARCHAR(255), cert_data TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (user_id, key_name));
INSERT INTO user_keys (user_id, key_name, cert_data) VALUES (1, 'id_rsa', '-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\nMIID...');
UPDATE user_keys SET cert_data = xenc_pkcs12_export('id_rsa', 'CA Certificate', '') WHERE user_id = 1 AND key_name = 'id_rsa';
SELECT user_id, key_name, cert_data FROM user_keys WHERE user_id = 1;
DELETE FROM user_keys WHERE user_id = 1 AND key_name = 'id_rsa';
